description:

This market will resolve to "Up" if the Solana price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the SOL/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/sol-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream SOL/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Will BUF/SF/HOU/LAR win their 2026 NFL Divisional Round games?
description:
This market will resolve according to the winning teams in the 2026 NFL Divisional Round games scheduled for January 17-18, 2026.

If any of the listed games are postponed to a date prior to or on February 1, 2026, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.

If any of the listed games ends is cancelled, postponed after February 1, 2026, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from the NFL.

question: Maple Leafs vs. Utah: O/U 5.5
description:
In the upcoming NHL game, scheduled for January 13 at 10:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if the Maple Leafs and Utah combine to score 6 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 6, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

events.title: Maple Leafs vs. Utah
events.description:
In the upcoming NHL game, scheduled for January 13 at 10:00PM ET:
If the Maple Leafs win, the market will resolve to "Maple Leafs".
If the Utah win, the market will resolve to "Utah".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods and shootouts. In the event of a shootout, one goal will be added to the winning team's score for the purpose of resolution.

This market will resolve to "Up" if the XRP price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the XRP/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/xrp-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream XRP/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Mobile Legends Bang Bang: CFU Gaming vs Team Zone (BO3)
description:
This market refers to the Mobile Legends Bang Bang match between CFU Gaming and Team Zone in the World Championship M7 Group Stage, scheduled for January 16 at 3:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "CFU Gaming" if CFU Gaming win the match against Team Zone.

This market will resolve to "Team Zone" if Team Zone win the match against CFU Gaming.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/mobilelegends/Main_Page.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 15, 9PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Series FULL SENSE Rounds Handicap (-5.5)
description:
This market refers to the Valorant match between ZETA DIVISION and FULL SENSE in the VCT Pacific Kickoff Playoffs, scheduled for January 22 at 6:00AM ET.

If FULL SENSE defeats ZETA DIVISION by 6 or more rounds across all Matchs in this match, this market will resolve to "FULL SENSE".

Otherwise, it will resolve to "ZETA DIVISION".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

events.title: Valorant: ZETA DIVISION vs FULL SENSE (BO3) - VCT Pacific Kickoff Playoffs
events.description:
This market will resolve to "ZETA DIVISION" if ZETA DIVISION win against FULL SENSE in the named Valorant match in the VCT Pacific Kickoff Playoffs, scheduled for January 22 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "FULL SENSE" if FULL SENSE win against ZETA DIVISION in the Valorant match.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.

If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/valorant/Main_Page.

question: Total Rounds Over/Under 51.5
description:
This market refers to the Valorant match between ZETA DIVISION and FULL SENSE in the VCT Pacific Kickoff Playoffs, scheduled for January 22 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of rounds across all Matchs in this match is greater than or equal to 52.

Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: Series 100 Thieves Rounds Handicap (-2.5)
description:
This market refers to the Valorant match between 100 Thieves and Leviatán Esports in the VCT Americas Kickoff Playoffs, scheduled for January 16 at 8:00PM ET.

If 100 Thieves defeats Leviatán Esports by 3 or more rounds across all Matchs in this match, this market will resolve to "100 Thieves".

Otherwise, it will resolve to "Leviatán Esports".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

events.title: Valorant: 100 Thieves vs Leviatán Esports (BO3) - VCT Americas Kickoff Playoffs
events.description:

This market will resolve to "Leviatán Esports" if Leviatán Esports win against 100 Thieves in the Valorant match.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.

If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/valorant/Main_Page.

This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the ETH/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the ETH/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/ETH_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance ETH/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Series Heroic Rounds Handicap (-5.5)
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between FriendlyCampers and Heroic in the BLAST Bounty Qualifier, scheduled for January 14 at 8:30AM ET.

If Heroic defeats FriendlyCampers by 6 or more rounds across all Matchs in this match, this market will resolve to "Heroic".

Otherwise, it will resolve to "FriendlyCampers".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.sofascore.com/esports.

This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between STATE and Prestige in the PLAYR Masters Group B, scheduled for January 16 at 10:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "STATE" if STATE win the match against Prestige.

This market will resolve to "Prestige" if Prestige win the match against STATE.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.sofascore.com/esports.

If the combined total is less than 238, this market will resolve to "Under".

description:

question: Shelton vs. Baez: Total Sets O/U 2.5
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Ben Shelton and Sebastian Baez in the ASB Classic, scheduled for January 15 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of sets completed equals or exceeds 3. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
A super tie breaker is considered as one (1) set for total set markets.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official ATP statistics.

events.title: ASB Classic: Ben Shelton vs Sebastian Baez
events.description:

This market will resolve to 'Shelton' if Ben Shelton advances against Sebastian Baez.

This market will resolve to 'Baez' if Sebastian Baez advances against Ben Shelton.
